notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-293 — thanks for testing! NEW THIS BUILD — 🕵️ 'Who's actually buying?': open the 🔬 Deep Dive on a share with a quiet-accumulation / informed footprint and you'll now see a gold panel linking straight to the public ASX filings — substantial holders (5%+), director trades (3Y), and announcements. It's the manual first step toward a future 'Insider Footprint' feature: the footprint is our estimate, the filings are fact, and it says plainly that sub-5% holdings aren't disclosed. PLEASE tell me: when a footprint shows, do you actually tap through to check who's holding it? That answer decides whether it's worth automating. Also live from recent builds: the 🔔 briefing double-open fix, My Rules ON/OFF, search-in-report, light/dark, full screen, Gap Report & Strong Trends. Feedback via the ✉ link top-left.
